sections.sectionTitle: Israel-te' Kiima Om Minam Dangte' Siatna

verses.text: A maizum theilo minam aw, hoihtakin thu ngaihsun in
Ansi bangin hong kizapkhiat ma, Topa' hehna na tungah hong tuk ma, Topa in a hehna hong lah hun a tun' ma-in thu ngaihsunin kikhel in

Kiniamkhiatin, Topa' thupiakna a mang Judah gammi khempeuh aw, Topa' kiang zuan un. A manin gamta un la, kiniamkhiat un. Tua hi leh Topa' hehna hong kilat ciangin, tua hehna hangin gimna panin na peng khathei ding uh hi
Gaza khuapi-ah kuamah om nawnlo ding a, Ashkelon khuapi kisusia ding hi. Ashdod khuamite suntangpi-in kihawlkhia ding a, Ekron khuamite kipaikhiatpih mang ding hi

Tuipi gei-ah a gual ten', no Filistia gammite aw, gimna na ngah ding uh hi. Filistia mite' ten'na Kanaan leitang aw, Topa in nang tungah thu hong khenzo hi. Mi khempeuh a beimang dongin hong susia ding hi
Tuipi gei-a om leitang aw, tuute' gamtatna mun, gamlak na suak lel ding hi

Judah mi a omlaite in na gamsung luah ding uh a, amaute in tuucin'na-in nei-in, Ashkelon khuasunga om innte sungah zanin lum ding uh hi. Topa ahi amaute' Pasian in amaute ompih ding a, citheisak kik ding hi
Vanglian Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Moab mite in ka mite a simmawhna, Ammon mite in ka mite a zahkona leh ka mite' gam a sutgawp dingin, a kisaktheih paunate uh ka za khin hi

Kei pen a nungta Israel Pasian ka hih mah bangin, Moab mite, Sodom mite bangin kisusia-in, Ammon mite, Gomorrah mite bangin kisusia-in, a gamsung uhah lingkung bek pozo-in, a gam uh cikhuk tawh kidimin a sia tawntung suakin, a suaktalai ka mite in a neihsa uh sutin, a gam uh a laksak tak kei leh, ci-in ka kiciam hi,” a ci hi
Amaute in Vanglian Topa' mite simmawhin kihisak uh ahih manin, a kiphatsakna hangun Moab mite leh Ammon mite in hih bangin gim thuak ding uh hi
Topa in amaute lausakgawp ding a, leitung pasian-te, neubawl gawp ding hi. Tua ciangin minam khempeuh in amau' gam ciat panun amah bia ding uh hi
No Ethiopia mite zong, Topa in hong that ding hi
Topa in leilu lamah a khut hong zanin Assiria gam susia ding a, Nineveh khuapi susia gawpin sehnel gam a suaksak ding hi

Tuu leh bawnghonte tua khuasungah lumin, gan namkim khawk a suak ding hi. Gunva leh gunvapite bangtung zawlah tuangin, tawlet-ah keising khuangin, sangkil tungah va-ak ham ding hi. Taamtak sing tawh a kilam innte maimang ding hi

A vangliatna a kisaktheihpih, lungmuang takin a om khuapi, tu-a bangin piang ding hi. Leitungah amau' khuapi a lian penin ngaihsun uh hi. Tua hinapi-in gamlak suakin, gamsate' omna suak ta hi. A mu mi khempeuh in lamdang sa-in kigaih ding uh hi.
